name: Cronitor
description: Monitoring platform for cron jobs, heartbeats, and scheduled tasks.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Cronitor at https://cronitor.io
2. Go to Settings - API Settings
3. Copy your SDK Integration API Key (provides full access to monitors, sites, status pages)
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Cronitor Settings - API Settings. Use the SDK Integration key for full API access.

checks.name: Cronitor App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Cronitor API is accessible.

checks.name: Cronitor Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Cronitor via API.
